task_completion.description: Verify the 'FT-847_Duplex' radio interface is created with the correct settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences or Radio configuration window showing an entry named 'FT-847_Duplex' with Host set to 'localhost', Port set to '4532', and Rig Type set to 'Duplex TRX'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'G-5500' rotator interface is created with the correct settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences or Rotator configuration window showing an entry named 'G-5500' with Host set to 'localhost' and Port set to '4533'.

task_completion.description: Verify a tracking module named 'Linear_SSB' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict module window, tab, or configuration dialog explicitly titled 'Linear_SSB'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct satellites are included in the 'Linear_SSB' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for AO-7 (or 7530), FO-29 (or 24278), and FuncUBE-1 / AO-73 (or 39444) in the selected satellites list during module configuration, or visible in the active module's tracking list.

task_completion.description: Verify the module layout displays only the Polar plot and Single-Satellite view, with the world map hidden.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the active 'Linear_SSB' module window. It must contain a circular Polar plot and a Single-Satellite data table/view. There should be NO rectangular world map visible in this module.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through GPredict menus (e.g., Edit -> Preferences, File -> New module) and dialog boxes rather than using a terminal to edit configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface must visually match GPredict's standard layout and windows, not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly writing to GPredict's configuration files via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows, if visible, should not show commands like 'nano', 'vim', 'echo', or 'cat' being used to create or modify '.cfg' or '.mod' files in the ~/.config/Gpredict/ directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Radio configuration requires Host: 'localhost', Port: '4532', and Rig Type: 'Duplex TRX' (internal type 3). Rotator configuration requires Host: 'localhost' and Port: '4533'. The required satellites for the module are AO-7 (NORAD 7530), FO-29 (NORAD 24278), and FuncUBE-1 / AO-73 (NORAD 39444).
